bids.reasoning: I am targeting maximum utility at the opening since there is no time pressure yet. The opponent’s first offer gives me low utility overall, with concessions only on issueD and issueE, so I will keep issueD as valueB since it is equally best for me while holding firm on the other high-value issues.

I am targeting maximum utility because it is still very early at t=0.02 and there is no deadline pressure to concede. The opponent’s second offer is worse for me than their opening offer, so they are not showing meaningful concession; with no messages to weigh, I will keep a strong bid while avoiding an exact repeat of my previous offer.
